subcodes.first_line: This is a day unto whose greatness and blessedness all the chosen ones, Prophets and divine Messengers have testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که بر بزرگی و مبارکی او جمیع اولیا و انبیا و سفرای الهی شهادت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @goodly deeds; actions
